$schema: Each asset describes a real Zevo app screen/feature. The concept generator and asset picker prefer these over Pexels stock when there is a semantic match for the shot.

assets.description: Live AR pose detection while user does a squat at home. Cyan skeleton overlay on user mid-rep, 'Squat 1:06' timer, 'TEKRAR 1/12' counter, form score badge '45' (yellow ring) on top-left, 'DİPTE ✓' depth-check marker. Home setting (wall, window, wooden floor).
assets.narrative: problem-state — user training alone, no idea their form is bad

assets.description: Shoulder press in a commercial gym. Cyan AR skeleton overlay tracking the user mid-rep. Form score badge '100' (emerald ring), 'Yük 80' (load 80kg) emoji badge, 'TEKRAR 2/12', 'Shoulder Press 2:58' timer, 'DİPTE ✓' marker. Mirror wall, dumbbells, kettlebells in background.
assets.narrative: transformation-state — same user, perfect form, scaling up weight

assets.description: Dark-themed run map (Strava-like) with a GPS route that literally spells 'ZEVO' in emerald green over Sakarya city streets. Stats overlay: Pace 8'30"/mi, Elevation 150ft, Distance 3.20mi. Brand name 'ZEVO' written at top.
assets.narrative: brand-magic — use as hook (cold open) or as final reveal before CTA
